## Description / Excerpt

A field grammar of thought, emotion, affect, uptake, attractor realms, and the distinction between true organizing centers and dark sinks.

Excerpt:

There is a familiar habit in modern thought: separate the human interior into distinct territories, then assign each a local ruler. Emotion goes in one box, thought in another, language in another, behavior in another, and perhaps consciousness stands somewhere above them all as
